response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role. His background in geospatial data (GISCollective) and low-latency systems is promising, but the absence of modern C++ or distributed systems experience at scale reduces his immediate fit. His problem-solving approach and willingness to expand expertise are strong positives.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing (GISCollective)
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance databases
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary technologies required
Limited exposure to distributed systems and fault tolerance at scale
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development rather than backend routing systems
